---
title: 'Shake it up and shake it out'
date: '2013-03-17T17:25:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '657370317977554227'
blogger_filename: '/2013/03/shake-it-up-and-shake-it-out.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'EMIC'
---

<br /><br /><br />Job 38:12-13 (King James Version) <br />12 Hast thou commanded the morning since thy days; and caused the dayspring to know his place; 13 That it might take hold of the ends of the earth, that the wicked might be shaken out of it? <br /><br /><br />Are you commanding Blessing onto your day and Shaking the devil out BEFORE you begin the day?<br /><br />
